name: ARE YOU BIGGER? | Nari
description:
You went out to the store to buy yourself some new condoms because you were out of them and met the Queen Bee of your university, who came there for the same thing, but forgot the money.


This bot is inspired by the authors ArthurGoatwin and bland1. I just wanted to change POV so it will be slightly different.

This is my first bot and Idk if I'll upload more, but eather way leave your criticism.

If you think I should make new bots(modified bots from other authors or written by me from scratch), leave a comments and follow to see what's next.
creator: Xtzzz
